task_completion.description: Load a sample project into QBlade
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade interface shows a loaded project (e.g., 'NREL_5MW') in the project tree or workspace, indicating a file was opened from the sample_projects directory.

task_completion.description: Open the Multi-Parameter BEM simulation module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Multi-Parameter BEM simulation setup window or tab is active in the QBlade GUI.

task_completion.description: Set the fixed Wind Speed parameter
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wind Speed parameter in the simulation setup is explicitly set to 10 m/s.

task_completion.description: Set the Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) range
task_completion.visual_evidence: The TSR (Tip Speed Ratio) range is configured with a start value of 2, an end value of 14, and a step size of 1.
The Pitch Angle range is configured with a start value of -5, an end value of 20, and a step size of 1.
Visual confirmation that the simulation has run, such as a completed progress bar, populated results tables, or generated aerodynamic performance map graphs (e.g., Cp/Ct surfaces) in QBlade.

task_completion.description: Save the project with simulation results
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager showing the project being saved as 'performance_map.wpa' in the '/home/ga/Documents/projects/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the QBlade GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the QBlade graphical user interface (clicking menus, entering values in dialogs) rather than using terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Simulation results are genuinely generated within QBlade
integrity.visual_evidence: The performance maps or result tables appear within the QBlade application windows, matching the inputted parameters, rather than being opened as static images or copied from external sources.

integrity.description: Project is saved via the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'performance_map.wpa' is saved using QBlade's internal save functionality, not just by renaming an existing file in the file explorer or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/projects/performance_map.wpa with a minimum size of 50 KB. Sample projects are located in /home/ga/Documents/sample_projects. The required simulation parameters are: Wind Speed = 10 m/s, Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) range = 2 to 14, and Pitch Angle range = -5 to 20 degrees.
